source_pr.title: executor: flaky test TestIndexUsageWithData
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #63501

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?

While investigating a flaky test failure for TestIndexUsageWithData - it uncovered that index usage is not reported for secondary indexes or nonclustered PK indexes if there are no statistics on the table (that is - if there are pseudo stats). Pointget is recorded - even without statistics. This is a design decision from the original implementation.

I improved the comments around the recording of the index usage, and improved the test to increase the chance that stats are loaded. And also - added a break to exit the current loop (to find the PK index) after the index is found.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: `TestIndexUsageWithData` was flaky because index-usage reporting depends on table statistics: if the table still has pseudo stats (or stats aren’t loaded yet), secondary/nonclustered index usage may not be recorded, so assertions can fail nondeterministically.
failure_signature: index usage tests: intermittent mismatch when expected index-usage samples are missing because statistics are pseudo/not loaded yet
root_cause_explanation: This test checks index-usage reporting, but the reporter relies on table statistics. When stats are pseudo or not yet loaded into memory, usage for some index types may not be recorded (by design), causing the test to fail intermittently depending on timing. The PR stabilizes the test by priming/stat-loading after `ANALYZE` (a small query to force synchronous stats load) and by clarifying/adjusting the reporting behavior and comments to match the intended design.
fix_pattern: For stats-sensitive tests, ensure statistics are loaded (not pseudo) before asserting index-usage reporting (e.g. run `ANALYZE` then execute a priming query to force sync load), and avoid assertions that depend on whether pseudo stats are present.
